title: Lake, Gallego deliver opening salvos after Arizona Senate primary
shortDescription: Arizona's Senate race features a Democrat vs. Republican matchup that could help determine which party controls the upper chamber in 2025.

title: President Biden addresses the largest prisoner swap since Cold War
shortDescription: Exchange of 24 prisoners follows months of negotiations and is biggest prisoner swap between Washington, Moscow and other governments since Cold War.

title: WATCH LIVE: Biden speaks after release of Gershkovich, Whelan
shortDescription: President Joe Biden will give remarks after a prisoner swap with Russia that freed detained Americans, including Evan Gershkovich.

title: Harris VP prospect Mark Kelly calls Trump 'desperate, scared old man'
shortDescription: Sen. Mark Kelly is taking a more aggressive tone toward Trump as he is under consideration for Kamala Harris' vice presidential nominee.

title: Trump refuses to take the bait from Harris VP prospect in Pennsylvania
shortDescription: As usual, Donald Trump's insult list on Wednesday was a long one. But he kept mum about one prominent name linked to his opponent's VP short list.

title: Harris leads in Minnesota polling; Trump loses grasp on flipping state
shortDescription: Recent polling has widened the chances of a Democrat holding onto the record for awarding their 10 electoral points to a presidential candidate.

title: Trump backed two GOP House candidates in Arizona; one won
shortDescription: In Abe Hamadeh, West Valley Republicans picked a Trump-styled candidate who spreads discredited election theories.

title: Donald Trump questions Kamala Harris' racial identity | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Biden's new Title IX rules all set to take effect Thursday but not everywhere. Firefighters battle massive wildfires in California and Colorado.

title: Harris responds to Trump's remarks on her race
shortDescription: Donald Trump made false remarks about Kamala Harris' racial identity while speaking at the National Association of Black Journalists.

title: Will Trump and Harris debate? Here's what they have said
shortDescription: When is the next presidential debate? Here's where things stand between Donald Trump and Kamala Harris.

title: Georgia voter cancelation portal launches with a major glitch
shortDescription: GA Sec. of State Brad Raffensperger says new program will “keep Georgia’s voter registration database up-to-date" but critics fear disenfranchisement

title: Biden’s Title IX rules are taking effect. But not in these states.
shortDescription: The president's new Title IX sex discrimination regulations are supposed to launch Aug. 1. But legal issues are stalling a national rollout.

title: Absentee voting deadline changes disenfranchise mostly Democrats
shortDescription: North Carolina requires mail-in ballots to arrive by Election Day under new Republican-backed laws, worrying voting rights advocates.

title: At Black journalism event, Trump might have been a surprise. He wasn't
shortDescription: Members of the National Association of Black Journalists, attending their annual convention in Chicago, got Trump's full truth – right to their faces.

title: White House photographer was not 'kicked off' X by Elon Musk | Fact check
shortDescription: Neither Musk nor anyone else who works for X removed photographer Pete Souza's account. He said in an Instagram post that he deactivated it himself.

title: Harris: Trump’s attacks on her Black identity show ‘divisiveness,’ ‘disrespect’
shortDescription: Kamala Harris said "the American people deserve better" in her first response to former President Donald Trump's combative interview with the NABJ.

title: Watch Donald Trump's interview at the NABJ conference
shortDescription: Donald Trump was interviewed by a panel of Black women journalists at the 2024 NABJ conference Wednesday. See the interview.

title: Asked about his age, Trump falsely claims Harris didn’t pass bar exam
shortDescription: Donald Trump, appearing in Chicago Wednesday, claimed that Kamala Harris did not pass the bar exam. Harris was admitted to the bar in 1990.
